subcodes.title: Words to Mary MacNutt et al in 1904
subcodes.first_line: I wish you to become heralds of happiness, because happiness is the cause of progress and development. The appearance of the Manifestations is to bring happiness
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @attaining the life of the spirit
